mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_history (id, instance_id, task_id, action, operator_id, comment, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{instanceId}, #{taskId}, #{action}, #{operatorId}, #{comment}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleted}, #{version})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wf_history WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE wf_history SET instance_id = #{instanceId}, task_id = #{taskId}, action = #{action}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, comment = #{comment}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE wf_history SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
